name: Ramp
description: Monitor Ramp user access and employee listing

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to the Ramp Developer Portal (developer.ramp.com)
2. Register a new application
3. Set the redirect URI to: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter them in the CompAI admin panel
6. Click Connect to authorize access to your Ramp account

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all active Ramp users with their roles
